title: Kevlar
description: A very simple lightweight Minecraft kevler mod.
body:
# Kevlar
A very simple lightweight Minecraft kevler mod. 

### Usage
Right-click with Aramid to heal 20 points of the the kevlar vest. With the "Auto Kevlar" enchantment the plates will be used automatically used when the damage on the vest is over 20.

### Crafting

Kevlar Upgrade Recipe
